title: erucastrum littoreum subsp. glabrum
intro: Erucastrum littoreum subsp. glabrum, also known as sea rocket, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and cardiovascular diseases. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, and may help in managing conditions like arthritis and hypertension. Herbal preparations of sea rocket typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or ointments for topical application.
